title: YTPMV - Hi, Billy Mays Here!
description:
Hi, TheKingOfSilverFoxes here with the most important video I have ever made. This is my tribute to the late, great Billy Mays. The icon may have passed on, but his legacy remains.

R.I.P. Billy Mays

DISCLAIMER: I don't own any of these clips. This video does not represent the opinions of the original creators of these clips. I am not profiting from their use in any way.
